    let total_sum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);

    let prefix_sum = 0;

        const current_r = prefix_sum % k;

        // get the max_prev for current_r

        let max_prev = max_prev_map.get(current_r) || -Infinity;

        const candidate = max_prev + prefix_sum;

        const dp_i = Math.max(dp_prev, candidate);

        // compute current_value

        const current_value = dp_i - prefix_sum;

        // update the map

        if (max_prev_map.has(current_r)) {

            const existing = max_prev_map.get(current_r);

            if (current_value > existing) {

                max_prev_map.set(current_r, current_value);

            }

        } else {

            max_prev_map.set(current_r, current_value);

        }

        dp_prev = dp_i;

    }

    return total_sum - dp_prev;

}

    let total_sum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);

    let prefix_sum = 0;

    let dp_prev = 0;

    max_prev_map.set(0, 0);

    for (const num of nums) {

        prefix_sum += num;

        const current_r = prefix_sum % k;

        // get the max_prev for current_r

        let max_prev = max_prev_map.get(current_r) || -Infinity;

        const candidate = max_prev + prefix_sum;

        const dp_i = Math.max(dp_prev, candidate);

        // compute current_value

        const current_value = dp_i - prefix_sum;

        // update the map

        if (max_prev_map.has(current_r)) {

            const existing = max_prev_map.get(current_r);

            if (current_value > existing) {

                max_prev_map.set(current_r, current_value);

            }

        } else {

            max_prev_map.set(current_r, current_value);

        }

        dp_prev = dp_i;

    }

    return total_sum - dp_prev;

}

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {

    let total_sum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);

    let prefix_sum = 0;

    let dp_prev = 0;

    const max_prev_map = new Map<number, number>();

    max_prev_map.set(0, 0);

    for (const num of nums) {

        prefix_sum += num;

        const current_r = prefix_sum % k;

        // get the max_prev for current_r

        let max_prev = max_prev_map.get(current_r) || -Infinity;

        const candidate = max_prev + prefix_sum;

        const dp_i = Math.max(dp_prev, candidate);

        // compute current_value

        const current_value = dp_i - prefix_sum;

        // update the map

        if (max_prev_map.has(current_r)) {

            const existing = max_prev_map.get(current_r);

            if (current_value > existing) {

                max_prev_map.set(current_r, current_value);

            }

        } else {

            max_prev_map.set(current_r, current_value);

        }

        dp_prev = dp_i;

    }

    return total_sum - dp_prev;

}
